REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION, 501, PLAINTIFF TAI-ANH NGUYEN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS IS OFF CALENDAR, RE-NOTICED FOR DECEMBER 15, 2016. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, AMENDED NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES CONTINUED FROM DEC-15-2016 TO REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTIONS CALENDAR AT JAN-19-2017, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 501 ON COURTS OWN MOTION. (501)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF TAI-ANH NGUYEN'S MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS IS GRANTED. COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF IS PREVAILING PARTY. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF COUNSEL IN THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $12,309.14. WRITTEN ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: SHERRY L. SAWYER, CSR NO. 5976, EMAIL: SSAWYER@SFTC.ORG. (D302)

calendar.matters:
Plaintiff Tai-Anh Nguyen'S Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jan-27-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Nelson W. Goodell of the law offices of The Goodell Law Firm (415.495.3950) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

Attorney, Jonathan Seigel of the law offices of Scheer Law Group, LLP (415.491.8900) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

Plaintiff Tai-Anh Nguyen'S Motion For Attorneys Fees And Costs is GRANTED. Court finds plaintiff is prevailing party. Attorney's fees and costs are awarded to plaintiff counsel in the total amount of $12,309.14. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR No. 5976, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
